abilities.shortEffect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
abilities.effect:
This Pokémon's remaining sleep turn count falls by 2 rather than 1.

If this Pokémon's sleep counter is at 1, it will fall to 0 and then the Pokémon will wake up.

abilities.shortEffect: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokémon has held no items in the meantime.
abilities.effect: After each turn, if the last item this Pokémon consumed was a Berry and it is not currently holding an item, it has a 50% chance of regaining that Berry, or a 100% chance during strong sunlight.
